titleStmt.title: SII 22.284: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 284. (A.R. No. 284 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJARĀJAKĒSARIVARMAN (RĀJARĀJA I) “who destroyed the ships at Kāndaḷūr-Śālai”— 11th YEAR (A.D. 995-96).

summary.p: The inscription is left incomplete towards the end. It records the consecration of an image of goddess Umā-Bhaṭṭārakiyār Ādisundaradēvadēviyār in the temple at Tirumālpēṟu by a certain Nimaḷa (Nirmala)-Śivar alias Nāṟpatteṇṇāyira-Piḍārar, the head of a maṭha at Tiruppālūr near Takkōlam in Maṇaiyiṟkōṭṭam, and the endowment of a land tax free for the worship of the goddess after purchasing the same from some Veḷḷāla brothers resident at the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī .
kāntaḷūr cālai
kalamaṟutta ko
virājarājakecari pa
nmaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 1- Ā
vatu maṇaiyiṟ ko
ṭṭattu taṉ kūṟṟu tak
kolattu tiruppā
lūril maṭamuṭai
ya nimaḷaciva(r)rāṉa
nāṟpatteṇṇā
yirappiṭārar tāmaṟ
kkoṭṭattu vallanā
ṭṭut tirumālppeṟṟil tām E
ḻuntaruḷivitta Umābhaṣṭārakiyār
Āti cuntradevadeviyārkku Ivūr veḷ
ḷāḷaṉ kaiyattuḻāṉ kuṇac celva
ṉ Aṅkāṭiyum tampimārum pakkal nā
ṉ vilai koṇṭuṭaiya pūmikku kiḻpāṟ
kellai catācivaṉ campan=taṉ vilaiko
ṇṭuṭaiya nilattukku meṟkkum
teṉpāṟkellai Uṭaiyar piṭā
ri ceṟuvukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkel
lai viraiyākkalip piccaṉ vilai
koṇṭuṭaiya pūmikku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟ
kellai kiḻakku nokki pāyñca Uḷciṟu
vāykkālukku teṟkum Innāāṉ kel
laiyum Uḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam patiṉaṟu
cāṇ kolāl Aḷaviṉvaḻi Aiññūṟu
kuḻiyum Iṟaiyiliyākak koṇṭu Ivūr
tiruvuṇṇāḻikai yuṭaiya sabhai
yom
Digital edition of SII 22.284 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
